summary: Iteration 32: Comprehensive testing of A/B Testing Z-test analysis and Apply Winner functionality. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend: Z-test badges (confidence %, 'Мало данных'), recommendation block with Z-test stats, and 'Применить победителя' button all working correctly. Public pages /sauny and /balie load without errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py _ab_ztest() function (lines 3198-3222): Correctly implements two-proportion z-test using math.erfc for p-value approximation
server.py analysis block (lines 3286-3325): Properly calculates winner_id, leader_id, z_test stats, and recommendation (apply_winner/needs_more_data/no_significant_difference)
server.py apply_ab_winner endpoint (lines 3368-3401): Correctly updates button_config with winning variant's text and sets status=completed
AnalyticsAdmin.jsx: Z-test badges display correctly - confidence % for significant tests, 'Мало данных (X/100)' for small samples
AnalyticsAdmin.jsx: Recommendation block shows Z-test stats (z-score, p-value, confidence) and 'Применить победителя' button
AnalyticsAdmin.jsx: Completed tests show blue 'Завершён' badge and applied variant indicator
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_UI_Iteration32_Significant test with 200 impressions (100 per variant), 35% vs 10% CTR - applied winner and deleted. Created TEST_UI_SmallSample test with 40 impressions - deleted after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: A/B testing Z-test analysis is fully functional. Backend: _ab_ztest() calculates z-score, p-value, confidence using math.erfc. GET /api/admin/ab/tests returns 'analysis' field with z_test, winner_id, recommendation. POST /api/admin/ab/tests/{id}/apply-winner updates button_config and sets status=completed. Frontend: Admin panel shows confidence badges, 'Мало данных' for small samples, recommendation block with Z-test stats, and 'Применить победителя' button. Existing completed tests: 'Hero CTA Test' (variant A applied), 'TEST_UI_Iteration32_Significant' (variant A applied).

backend_ztest_analysis_field.details: GET /api/admin/ab/tests returns tests with 'analysis' field containing z_test, winner_id, leader_id, total_impressions, recommendation

backend_ztest_fields.details: z_test object contains z_score, p_value, confidence, significant, min_sample

backend_ztest_significant_difference.details: Variant A 30% CTR vs Variant B 10% CTR → significant=True, p_value<0.05, confidence>=95%, recommendation=apply_winner

backend_apply_winner_updates_config.details: POST /api/admin/ab/tests/{id}/apply-winner updates button_config with winning variant's text_pl and text_en

backend_apply_winner_sets_completed.details: Apply winner sets test status=completed, applied_variant, completed_at timestamp

frontend_completed_test_badge.details: Completed tests show blue 'Завершён' badge and 'Тест завершён. Вариант X применён как основной текст кнопки.'

frontend_confidence_badge.details: Significant tests show 'X% уверенность' badge (e.g., '100% уверенность')

frontend_needs_more_data_badge.details: Tests with <100 impressions show 'Мало данных (X/100)' badge

frontend_recommendation_block.details: Significant tests show recommendation block with Z-test stats (z-score, p-value, confidence) and 'Применить победителя' button

frontend_apply_winner_button.details: 'Применить победителя' button works - shows confirmation dialog, applies winner, updates test to completed

frontend_sauny_page.details: /sauny loads without errors, hero section and CTA buttons visible

frontend_balie_page.details: /balie loads without errors, hero section and CTA buttons visible
